output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?event ?date WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q832156 ; wdt:P276 ?location ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  ?location wdt:P17 wd:Q165 .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
